name: Extract patient referrals from PDFs and route to departments

parameters.content:
## 🏥 Patient Referral Processor

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for referral letters
2. Extracts patient info, referring MD, diagnosis
3. Identifies urgency level (routine/urgent/stat)
4. Routes to the right department automatically
5. Logs referral to Google Sheets
6. Sends Slack alert with referral details

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for referral documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Patient Name | DOB | Phone | Insurance | Referring MD | MD Practice | Diagnosis | ICD Codes | Urgency | Requested Service | Department | Status | Referral Date | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Hospital intake teams
- Referral coordinators
- Specialty clinic staff

parameters.prompt: Extract patient referral information including: patient full name, date of birth, gender, phone number, address, insurance provider, insurance ID, referring physician name, referring physician practice, referring physician phone, referring physician fax, referring physician NPI, referral date, diagnosis or reason for referral, ICD-10 codes if present, urgency level (routine/urgent/emergent/stat), requested services or specialty, requested provider if specified, relevant medical history, current medications, allergies, recent test results mentioned, and any special instructions or notes.
